content.claim: Hungary's rural depopulation is severe: approximately 645 localities have populations below 300, and one-fifth of all Hungarian localities face slow decline into complete depopulation, with 147 projected to eventually become completely depopulated.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Education finance lens
limitations: Based on projections rather than observed outcomes
Precise timelines for depopulation are inherently uncertain
Stock estimate from 2021; current trajectory may have shifted
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
